mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_role WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT r.* FROM t_role r INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_role (tenant_id, role_code, role_name, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_role SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM t_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
